docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED NOV-05-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YALOIZ, ALI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TALLERICO, TIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YALOIZ, ALI PLAINTIFF'S REMEDY IS WITH THE PRIOR OWNER OF THE SUBJECT BUSINESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. AYHAN YITAK INTERPRETS ENGLISH/TURKISH - TURKISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,751.00 FILED BY TALLERICO, TIM AS TO DEFENDANT YALOIZ, ALI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TALLERICO, TIM
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TALLERICO, TIM
ORDER ON (SC-108)REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
